title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say how the working conditions might be affecting the people and what challenges they might be facing.

images.label: A
images.description: A farmer working outdoors in a muddy field during heavy rain, wearing waterproof gear.

images.label: B
images.description: A person working in a very modern, brightly lit and quiet high-tech office with multiple screens.

followUp.question: In which environment do you think it is hardest to stay focused? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two pictures, and say why the people might have chosen to learn these skills and how they might be feeling.

images.label: D
images.description: An elderly person being taught how to use a tablet or computer by a younger person.

images.label: E
images.description: A student in a garage learning how to repair a car engine with a mechanic.

followUp.question: Which of these skills do you think will be the most useful in the long term? (Why?)
